funcbody:
func (c *Context) reset() {
	c.Writer = &c.writermem
	c.Params = c.Params[:0]
	c.handlers = nil
	c.index = -1

	c.fullPath = ""
	c.Keys = nil
	c.Errors = c.Errors[:0]
	c.Accepted = nil
	c.queryCache = nil
	c.formCache = nil
	c.sameSite = 0
	*c.params = (*c.params)[:0]
	*c.skippedNodes = (*c.skippedNodes)[:0]
}
